provenance.source_corpus: Restoration of foothills rough fescue grassland following pipeline disturbance in southwestern Alberta

source_spans.text: Pipeline construction prior to 1997 typically required a right-of-way (ROW) of 15e30 m in width from which the topsoil was stripped
The ROW sites had a higher proportion of introduced grasses and forbs
The ROW sites had... less topsoil
The ROW sites had... poorer rangeland health than the adjacent undisturbed grassland
Within the ROW sites, less topsoil was present on those with larger diameter pipe
which had topsoil fully stripped from the ROW during construction
Introduced grasses, Festuca ovina (sheep fescue) and Poa compressa (Canada bluegrass), succeeded in establishment following seeding
Introduced grasses, Festuca ovina (sheep fescue) and Poa compressa (Canada bluegrass), succeeded in establishment following seeding
Contributing factors to moderate recovery of rough fescue grassland were related to post-growing season pipeline construction
Contributing factors to moderate recovery of rough fescue grassland were related to post-growing season pipeline construction
minimum disturbance trench-only stripping
Soil stripping may reduce organic matter
increase clay content through admixing of topsoil with subsoil

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:00b2905898c7
edges.original_sentence: The ROW sites had a higher proportion of introduced grasses and forbs, less topsoil, and poorer rangeland health than the adjacent undisturbed grassland.

source_spans.text: The ROW sites had a higher proportion of introduced grasses and forbs, less topsoil, and poorer rangeland health than the adjacent undisturbed grassland.

source_document.title: Restoration of foothills rough fescue grassland following pipeline disturbance in southwestern Alberta

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:0581f712f081
edges.original_sentence: Within the ROW sites, less topsoil was present on those with larger diameter pipe and which had topsoil fully stripped from the ROW during construction.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:d68878382793
edges.original_sentence: Introduced grasses, Festuca ovina (sheep fescue) and Poa compressa (Canada bluegrass), succeeded in establishment following seeding and persisted for at least 40 years.

source_spans.text: Introduced grasses, Festuca ovina (sheep fescue) and Poa compressa (Canada bluegrass), succeeded in establishment following seeding and persisted for at least 40 years.

source_document.title: Restoration of foothills rough fescue grassland following pipeline disturbance in southwestern Alberta

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:4dfd718dedb9
edges.original_sentence: Contributing factors to moderate recovery of rough fescue grassland were related to post-growing season pipeline construction, ideally, between August and March, summer or fall seeding, and minimum disturbance trench-only stripping.
